title: OpenClaw Sub Agents and ACPX (OpenClaw Business Automation Setup)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates running OpenClaw on a Raspberry Pi to automate business tasks by deploying sub-agents into a content pipeline. He compares OpenClaw's multi-agent orchestration approach with single-agent workflows using Claude Code with Opus, using GitHub repos as a synchronization layer and markdown files as a knowledge base for agent coordination.
